zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Grey於大約1440年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素時，她的父親Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys23歲，母親Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville11438歲。她於1465年與Sir Roger Kynaston在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1501年之後在英國史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Grey于大约1440年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素时，她的父亲Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys23岁，母亲Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville11438岁。她于1465年与Sir Roger Kynaston在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1501年之后在英国史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Grey was born about 1440, in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys, was 23 and her mother, Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville, was 11438. She married Sir Roger Kynaston in 1465, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died after 1501, in Shropshire, England.

fr.Nannau, Merionethshire, , Wales: Nannau, Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Grey est née environ 1440, à Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville, avait 11438 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Kynaston en 1465, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée après 1501, à Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Grey um 1440 in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys 23 und ihre Mutter Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville 11438. Sie hat 1465 in England, United Kingdom Sir Roger Kynaston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1501 in Shropshire, England.

ht.Nannau, Merionethshire, , Wales: Nannau, Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Grey è nata il circa 1440 nel Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles, sua padre, Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville, aveva 11438 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger Kynaston nel 1465, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì dopo il 1501, nel Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greyが約1440年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアカストルで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powysは23歳，母Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankervilleは11438歳であった。1465年にイギリスイギリスでSir Roger Kynastonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1501年以後にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Grey(이)가 대략 1440년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville(은)는 11438세였다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Roger Kynaston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1501년 이후 영국 슈럽실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1440, em Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville, tinha 11438 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Kynaston em 1465, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1501, em Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Grey родилась около 1440 г. в местности кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville, 11438. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Kynaston в 1465 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла после 1501 г. в местности шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Grey nació aproximadamente 1440, en Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville, tenía 11438 años. Se casó con Sir Roger Kynaston en 1465, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió después de 1501, en Shropshire, Inglaterra.
